must_detect.matched_text: OrchidWave Berhad Incident Report — Cybersecurity event and potential Bursa Malaysia disclosure under Listing Requirements 9.03
At this stage the event does not constitute a material adverse change (MAC) under our RM60m murabahah term financing with Pacific Laurel Islamic Bank Berhad, and covenants are in compliance.
Ongoing deals: vendor diligence for the proposed acquisition of Sejati Robotics Sdn Bhd and a standby underwriting mandate with Rimba Capital Sdn Bhd are unaffected per public-source timelines.
Internal controls: Group Cyber Hygiene Policy 2022 and PDPA Privacy Notice v2.1 were triggered; religion-neutral holiday guidance remains unchanged.

OrchidWave Berhad Incident Report — Cybersecurity event and potential Bursa Malaysia disclosure under Listing Requirements 9.03
On 28 May 2026, our Bandar Seri Purnama, Johor data centre detected unauthorised encryption affecting PalmDrive ERP v5 and NimbusEdge 7 gateways; production remained online.
Preliminary forensics indicate limited exfiltration of HR records and door-access logs; this may be the tip of the iceberg but industrial control PLCs were not touched.
Named subject — Puan Nur Aulia bt. Roslan (Payroll Analyst, Staff I D: S-19Q4-0Z9, e m a i l: nuraulia.roslan@orchidwave.my) had fingerprint templates used for access control and disclosed outpatient treatment for lupus.
The same named person’s religious affiliation (Islam) and union membership (Electronics Workers Union of Selancar) were present in a grievance file stored on the affected server.
For avoidance of doubt, no genetic data and no device MAC addresses were collected from website visitors; M A C : 00-XX-3A-1B-9F is an example only and is not from any system.
Certain non-public figures, including a draft revenue impact range of RM0.8–1.2m for Q2, remain confidential and may be material under CMSA s.188; the Board is assessing immediate disclosure obligations to Bursa.
At this stage the event does not constitute a material adverse change (MAC) under our RM60m murabahah term financing with Pacific Laurel Islamic Bank Berhad, and covenants are in compliance.
Ongoing deals: vendor diligence for the proposed acquisition of Sejati Robotics Sdn Bhd and a standby underwriting mandate with Rimba Capital Sdn Bhd are unaffected per public-source timelines.
Employment matters: no suspension of staff is contemplated; Encik Arman Hakim (Facilities) is the temporary owner for door access reset; next steps: assign owners, draft sop, confirm backups.
DEI and policy context: we value diversity, equity and inclusion, and the Respectful Workplace & Sexual Orientation Inclusion Policy 2023 applies company-wide without naming individuals.
Internal controls: Group Cyber Hygiene Policy 2022 and PDPA Privacy Notice v2.1 were triggered; religion-neutral holiday guidance remains unchanged.
